attributes.description: Established in 1982, Mastek is a provider of vertically-focused enterprise technology solutions. Having its presence in IT industry for almost 4 decades, Mastek Ltd has evolved from an IT solutions provider to Digital transformation partner.[1]

Established in 1982, Mastek is a provider of vertically-focused enterprise technology solutions. Having its presence in IT industry for almost 4 decades, Mastek Ltd has evolved from an IT solutions provider to Digital transformation partner.[1]
